name: Pineapple Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Gently fold in the crushed pineapple and cubed white bread.
4. Pour the batter into a buttered bread pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-60 minutes, or until set.
Mrs. William Buffum
